title: ShowLabel Property
description: Specifies whether to show a label for rendered character strings.
notes:
Specify the type of result rendered as a character string in the TextView object.  The results available for selection will vary depending on the vision object type specified in the TextObj property.

Values

False	Do not show label.

True	Show a label

Default:  True
see_also:
